creator: amutu@amutu.com
text:
(In reply to Richard Gallamore from comment #5)
hi Richard，
fetch ok for me：

# rm ../../distfiles/liblinear-2.11.zip 
# make fetch
===>  License BSD3CLAUSE accepted by the user
===>   liblinear-2.11 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
=> liblinear-2.11.zip doesn't seem to exist in /usr/local/poudriere/ports/default/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch http://www.csie.ntu.edu.tw/~cjlin/liblinear/liblinear-2.11.zip
liblinear-2.11.zip                            100% of  510 kB  502 kBps 00m01s
===> Fetching all distfiles required by liblinear-2.11 for building

maybe you can try later?
